theme_rankings.why_now: 거버넌스보단 실제 트래픽·결제 사용처. TON·BNB 일일 활성 유저 검증.
theme_rankings.risk: 투기 대비 변동성 낮지만 폭발력도 작음. 환희장에서 underperform.

theme_rankings.why_now: 토큰 가격은 하락했지만 매출 폭증 중. AI Capex 사이클의 크립토 노출 직접.
theme_rankings.risk: 토큰 인플레이션 압력 + 사용자 보상 의존. 베어 마켓에서 매도 압력 큼.

theme_rankings.why_now: 실제 매출 + 토큰 보유자 환원. P/S 가시화로 밸류에이션 재평가 단계.
theme_rankings.risk: 스마트컨트랙트 위험 + 규제. 매출은 시장 변동성에 큰 폭으로 변동.

theme_rankings.tagline: 🌐 검증된 L1 — 이더 외 실수요 입증된 체인들
theme_rankings.why_now: 솔라나 압도적 점유 + 신흥 L1(Sui·Aptos)도 자금 유입. 생태계 prop value 확보.
theme_rankings.risk: L1 간 경쟁 격화. 사용자·개발자 이탈 시 멀티플 빠르게 축소.

theme_rankings.tagline: 📈 ETF 승인 후보 + 이더 L2 — 기관 매집 영역
theme_rankings.why_now: SOL·LTC ETF 가능성 + L2 거래량 회복. 다음 cycle 메이저 후보.
theme_rankings.risk: ETF 미승인 시 단기 조정. L2는 fee market 경쟁 심화.

theme_rankings.tagline: 🤖 크립토 버전 AI 베팅 — 분산 컴퓨팅·에이전트
theme_rankings.why_now: AI Capex 사이클의 크립토 노출. 미국 AI 주식 테마와 동행 흐름.
theme_rankings.risk: 내러티브 의존도 큼. 실수요 검증 아직 미흡. 알트 변동성 폭.

theme_rankings.tagline: 🥇 시장 방향성 기준 — 비트는 디지털 금, 이더는 인프라
theme_rankings.why_now: BTC ETF 자금 유입, ETH 스테이킹 + L2 매출. 알트 사이클의 출발점.
theme_rankings.risk: 거시 유동성·금리에 직접 노출. ETF 자금 흐름이 단기 방향성을 좌우.

theme_rankings.why_now: 기관 자금 유입 가장 빠른 영역. BlackRock·Franklin 등 진입.
theme_rankings.risk: 규제 의존적. 거시 금리 환경 변화 시 단기 자금 이탈 가능.

top_news.title: Low-Cost Airlines ‘Ripe’ For Mergers, Deutsche Bank Analyst Says
top_news.summary: The US airline industry is primed for a new round of mergers as low-cost carriers are squeezed by the oil-price spike, according to Deutsche Bank analyst Michael Linenberg.

top_news.title: Ramaphosa Defies Calls to Resign as Parliament Prepares Inquiry
top_news.summary: South African President Cyril Ramaphosa said he would contest a report that criticized his handling of a robbery at his farm in 2020 after a ruling by the nation’s top court resurrected the scandal, and rejected calls to stand down.

top_news.title: Telus CEO of 26 Years Urges Successor to Take Risks, Trust Team
top_news.summary: Telus Corp. Chief Executive Officer Darren Entwistle shared parting words of wisdom for his replacement, shortly before he leaves the job he’s occupied for 26 years.

top_news.title: Healthcare Firm Accendra Inks Discount Debt Exchange, New Funds
top_news.summary: Accendra Health Inc. has reached an agreement with a majority of its creditors to push out the maturities of its existing debt through debt exchanges, some of them at a discount.

top_news.title: Carlyle BDC Cuts Dividend Even As It Flags Better Credit Market
top_news.summary: A private credit fund managed by Carlyle Group Inc. cut the value of its assets in the first quarter and lowered its dividend, while reporting that it originated more loan deals.

top_news.title: Onex Seeks $1 Billion to Hang Onto OneDigital Stake For Longer
top_news.summary: Onex Partners aims to raise $1 billion to extend its minority ownership of insurance brokerage and employer adviser OneDigital, as more private asset firms tap the booming secondaries market.

top_news.title: United Revives Junk-Rated Muni Sale for Its Biggest Kitchen Ever
top_news.summary: United Airlines Holding Inc. is returning to the municipal bond market with a junk-rated $256 million sale, after last year’s volatility forced it to postpone the deal.

top_news.title: Pimco Scorns Daily Marks on Private Assets That Apollo Heralded
top_news.summary: More frequently marking assets does little to improve transparency or accuracy in the $1.8 trillion private credit market, according to Pacific Investment Management Co. strategist Lotfi Karoui.

top_news.title: Crop Futures Advance Ahead of Key USDA Report, China Summit
top_news.summary: Grain and oilseed futures rose ahead of a key US government supply-and-demand report and a summit between President Donald Trump and Xi Jinping, who leads the world’s biggest importer of soybeans.

top_news.title: Goldman, BofA Delay Fed Cut Calls After ‘Last Straw’ Jobs Data
top_news.summary: Goldman Sachs & Co and Bank of America Corp are the latest in a growing cohort of Wall Street banks pushing back their forecasts for interest-rate cuts, arguing that both jobs and inflation data make a case for the Federal Reserve to keep rates on hold until at least the end of the year.
